meaning: 莱特岛[菲律宾中东部](在吕宋岛同棉兰老岛之间)
examples: In the Leyte Mountains of the Philippines, along the edge of the rainforest, small sounds travel far.
When Tammy and I moved away from church planting work in Leyte, the work there was certainly not all finished.
The fleet was assembling near the Ryukyu Islands, waiting to launch a fatal surprise attack on the US Navy, to repeat Pearl Harbor and Leyte Gulf.
To take one of countless examples, on the island of Leyte, Alberto Veloso is running for governor.
Imelda's brother, Alfredo "Bejo" Romualdez has been elected mayor of Tacloban City in their home province of Leyte in the Visayas.
